name: P1 Incident Response
description: Every P1 incident is acknowledged within 15 minutes (24/7), updated at least every 30 minutes while open, and followed by a post-incident report within 3 business days of resolution.

entity.name: Incident
entity.description: A P1 (critical severity) production incident raised in the on-call paging system

correlationKey.description: The unique incident ID assigned by the paging system (e.g. PagerDuty) when the incident is created

promise.text: Every P1 incident is acknowledged within 15 minutes, updated every 30 minutes while open, and followed by a post-incident report within 3 business days of resolution.

startConditions.description: A P1-severity incident is raised in the paging system
startConditions.trigger: PagerDuty incident.trigger webhook, filtered to severity=P1

states.name: Raised
states.description: A P1 incident has been created and is awaiting acknowledgment.

states.name: Acknowledged
states.description: An on-call engineer has acknowledged the incident.

states.name: Open (Updating)
states.description: The incident is open; status updates are being posted on a recurring cadence.

states.name: Resolved
states.description: The incident is resolved; a post-incident report is still owed.

states.name: Postmortem Complete
states.description: The post-incident report has been submitted.

states.name: Downgraded
states.description: Severity dropped below P1 before resolution; this contract's scope no longer applies.

events.name: Acknowledged
events.description: An on-call engineer acknowledged the incident.

events.name: Status Update Posted
events.description: A status update was posted to the incident channel.

events.name: Severity Downgraded
events.description: The incident's severity was downgraded below P1.

terminalOutcomes.description: The incident was fully handled, including the post-incident report.
No longer a P1 -- this contract's obligations no longer apply.

exceptions.condition: No acknowledgment 15 minutes after the incident was raised
exceptions.suggestedAction: Acknowledge the incident and begin response immediately; this SLA breach may trigger secondary on-call escalation per your paging policy.

evidenceRequirements.description: Who acknowledged the incident and when.
The status update text and when it was posted.

assumptions.text: Assumed the ack and status-update SLAs run 24/7 (not business-hours-limited), matching real incident-response practice.
